Annotation

Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us
The patient shows significantly elevated creatinine and mildly elevated potassium, suggesting impaired renal function. Total CO₂ is slightly low, possibly indicating mild metabolic acidosis. Other parameters, including glucose, liver enzymes, and lipids, are within normal limits. Recommend clinical correlation for renal impairment and consideration of further nephrological evaluation.
